description: Dollar Radar - aggregates the FRED trade-weighted dollar family (Broad, Advanced, Emerging, Real) plus bilateral crosses, scores a 10-signal pump/dump canary composite (net liquidity, QE/QT, RRP, TGA, real yields, rate spread, VIX, credit, momentum, funding stress) and detects double tops/bottoms on the dollar index. data/dollar-radar.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Dollar Radar - every 6h via EventBridge Scheduler, re-scoring the dollar pump/dump canary composite as the FRED liquidity, rate and volatility feeds update.
